Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly covers '籃球運動傷害之防治' (prevention of basketball sports injuries) and '預防與急救' (prevention and first aid), directly promoting physical well-being and aligning with Target 3.4 on promoting health and preventing disease.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course objective to '瞭解籃球規則' (understand basketball rules) provides a minimal, inferred link to promoting rule-following, a concept related to Target 16.3 on the rule of law.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course includes '小組互動、互評' (group interaction, peer evaluation) and '團隊三人組合' (team of three combination), fostering teamwork and collaboration skills, which are foundational for partnerships, albeit at a micro-level.
